subject: Granbull, a large stocky bulldog-like creature with prominent oversized fangs and a spiked collar, posed aggressively on rocky dirt terrain
description: A stocky, pink-lavender bulldog creature dominates the frame in a mid-shot composition. It has enormously oversized lower fangs jutting upward, a wide flat snout, and wears a spiked collar around its neck. The creature crouches forward on rocky earth with its arms spread wide, conveying a charging or defensive posture. The background is a warm earthy brown with hints of rock and soil. The creature's expression reads as alert and aggressive despite the flavor text noting its timid nature — the art leans into the imposing physical silhouette.
foreground: Large pink-lavender bulldog creature on rocky ground, spiked collar visible, oversized fangs prominent
background: Warm earthy brown rocky terrain, soft light
emotion: Aggressive posture, wide stance, teeth bared — imposing physical display despite implied timidity
